case_title: SHEILA JACKSON VS. KUANG SHI HUANG

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,709.44 FILED BY JACKSON, SHEILA AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, KUANG SHI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED APR-01-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, KUANG SHI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON, SHEILA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, KUANG SHI $3,709.44 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,759.44 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-26-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-26-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF SHEILA JACKSON IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS. DEFENDANT KUANG SHI HUANG IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, KUANG SHI
